_note: Edit freely. The /news-radar slash command reads this file each run. Add new sources as RSS URLs. Remove sources you don't care about to cut noise. Some sources are blocked by Claude Code's WebFetch sandbox (Eurogamer, RPS, Polygon, IGN, The Verge, Reddit); they're noted in `_blocked` below for awareness rather than included in the active lists.

press.name: GamesRadar
press.focus: Broad gaming coverage, lots of features

youtube._note: YouTube channels expose RSS via https://www.youtube.com/feeds/videos.xml?channel_id=CHANNEL_ID. Add channels you follow. Leave empty to skip YouTube.

_blocked._note: Sources that Claude Code's WebFetch sandbox refuses. Keep the URLs here as a reminder; try periodically since sandbox policies change. Reddit would need the JSON API (auth'd) or an alternative fetcher.

http_errors.name: Bungie News
http_errors._tip: URL may have changed; check bungie.net for current feed endpoint

http_errors.name: Blizzard News
http_errors._tip: URL may have changed; check news.blizzard.com footer for RSS
